_comment: Canonical tags and categories for your Mealie instance.
_instructions: Copy this file to userdata/taxonomy.json and edit to match your setup.
tags: step 2 (cleanup) will DELETE any tag in Mealie not listed here.
categories: step 2 will DELETE any category not listed here.
step 3 (apply) will AUTO-CREATE anything listed here that is missing from Mealie.
Casing matters — tag names must match exactly what you want in Mealie.
